legacy.notAvailableText: There is no renderable matching report for this invitation yet.
legacy.autoRefresh: We are checking the status automatically in the background.
legacy.renderingText: The new founder matching report is not fully available yet. Please check again in a few moments.
legacy.lockedTitle: This team report is not unlocked yet.
legacy.lockedText: Unlocking is not active for this legacy report yet.
legacy.lockedAdvisorText: Once an advisor or accelerator unlocks the report for you, it will be available to the team.
legacy.lockedPdfText: Unlocking is coming soon. Until then, PDF export stays disabled for this report.
legacy.lockedFullText: The full report becomes visible after unlock.
legacy.freeBetaEyebrow: Available for free during the test phase
legacy.freeBetaTitle: This report is fully unlocked during the current test phase.
legacy.freeBetaText: Later, unlocking can run through team or report access.
legacy.unrenderableText: The report is unlocked, but the detailed analysis cannot be rendered for this older data set yet.
legacy.workbookTitle: These points should not be clarified on the side.
legacy.workbookText: In the workbook, you define how you want to work with them.

session.emptyTitle: The dynamics report has not been created yet.
session.emptyText: Once the matching session is ready, you can create the report as a snapshot from the matching preparation page.
session.snapshotHint: Session-based snapshot · no invitation, no legacy report, no workbook
session.snapshotText: This report was created from your matching session. It does not create an invitation, relationship, or workbook.
session.workspaceReadyText: Your shared connection has been created. The workbook/operating agreement will be connected as the next step.
session.prepareWorkspaceText: If you want to continue, you can prepare a shared workspace from this report. This creates a shared connection. The workbook will be connected in the next step.
session.prepareWorkspaceSafety: No invitation, legacy report, or workbook will be created.

view.sessionCentralPatternHint: Use these points as a starting point for a calm conversation about roles, expectations, and collaboration.
view.legacyCentralPatternHint: You will see the key points for your collaboration in the full report.
view.conversationPrompts: Conversation prompts for your next conversation
view.conversationPromptsText: These questions are intended as a next step after you have reviewed the patterns and scales.

individual.defaultDescription: This report shows your current founder profile through the six dimensions first and adds scale interpretation only where it helps you understand day-to-day work.

missing.title: Individual report
missing.description: Your individual report needs a submitted base questionnaire first.

sections.everyday: 2. How you show up day to day
sections.teamBreak: 3. Where things can tip in a team

labels.valuesFallback: Complete the values add-on to receive a condensed values interpretation.
